prompt: I'm seeing 4 separate complaints this week on Soursop Vit C from lot 24-11 — all skin reactions, two with medical visits. Trigger a recall on Soursop Vit C batch 24-11.
assertions: Recognizes the explicit recall kickoff phrase and walks SKN-OPS-003 rather than auto-firing a recall silently
Drafts §4.A issue summary and §4.B scope (units produced, channel split) rather than skipping straight to comms
Drafts customer notification per §4.C in multiple forms (email, phone script, letter)
Drafts §4.D return/disposal plan with an oc3pl-order-manager handoff
Stages a CAPA brief for capa-coordinator per §4.E rather than opening a CAPA directly
Names cross-functional asks with owners and explicit step-by-step HITL gates; no comms are claimed as sent
